title: Enable "red-dot" notifications in the desktopapp  dock / tray
excerpt: Just like Slack, Teams, Outlook… it would be SO helpful to set @mentions to generate a “red dot” notification in my desktop dock/tray. So much of Monday is about chat, communication, notifications and the inbox… why woul…

posts.author: miss.meg (Megan Paskin)
posts.cookedHtml: Just like Slack, Teams, Outlook… it would be SO helpful to set @mentions to generate a “red dot” notification in my desktop dock/tray. So much of Monday is about chat, communication, notifications and the inbox… why would you keep the red dot only visible IN the app?
